history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A basketball player, identified by the name "JAMES" and the number "23" on his white jersey with purple trim, is shown in motion on a wooden court. He is wearing white shorts with purple trim and what appears to be red underwear is visible due to the shorts being slightly torn or pulled. His body is angled, with his right hand on his hip and his left arm bent. A large, bright red arrow is prominently displayed in the upper left quadrant of the image, pointing diagonally downwards towards the player's lower body. The background is a neutral, slightly blurred court setting, suggesting a game in progress. The lighting is bright and focused, typical of an indoor sports arena, creating some shadows but generally illuminating the scene clearly. The color palette is dominated by the white and purple of the jersey and shorts, contrasted by the red of the arrow and underwear, and the brown tones of the player's skin. The mood is dynamic and potentially humorous or attention-grabbing due to the prominent arrow and the unexpected wardrobe malfunction.
